case_title: WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE VS. LESTER PETERSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $551.56 FILED BY WEST WIND AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, LESTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY NISSIM NINIO--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
